meaning: vt.照明,照亮,阐明,说明,使灿烂,以灯火装饰(街道等)vi.照亮
examples: Instead of formulas and charts, the two instructors use games and drawings to illuminate their subject.
Second, data can illuminate patterns of behavior we haven't yet noticed.
Such explanations, however, illuminate neither the source of this curious convention nor the reason for its popularity.
In my experience, such high-concept stagings rarely if ever illuminate the work in question.
Their headlamps illuminate soda-straw rock drippings from the ceiling, and rippled flowstone on the cave walls.
